ops.body: T3 watcher lane: trained on Tinker (run c7f29e99…, best checkpoint sampler_weights/step1758 fetched) but REJECTED at the MLX parity gate — "parity max abs diff 0.2603 > tolerance 0.05". Fresh-epoch behaved as designed (parity is one of the deliberately-kept absolute checks); no promotion, daemon still serves v001, journal carries the rejected line. This is a conversion-fidelity finding to diagnose (convert_peft_to_mlx on the new clean-data adapter/checkpoint format vs the Tinker-served reference), not a harness failure. Gate lane's v002 promotion stands. T3 completes after the parity diagnosis + a successful watcher promote; the Sunday lane will skip only the gate (digest recorded) and retry the watcher (no promoted digest) — which is correct behavior.
